normalization_defect.physical_formula: N_det(P) = s_det(P) - sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(P)
normalization_defect.trace_lift_formula: Theta(r) = 3 mu(r) - sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(r)

equivalent_source_shell_cocycle_formulat.cocycle: O_M(r,r') = S_M(r') - S_M(r) = (1/2) * sum_e M_e^ch * [log(g_e(r')/g_e(r)) + log(d_e(r')/d_e(r))]
equivalent_source_shell_cocycle_formulat.closure_criterion: O_M(r,r') = 0 on common physical charged fibers together with one basepoint normalization S_M(r_0) = 3 mu(r_0)

exact_smaller_sufficient_theorem.statement: Attach the charged determinant exponent vector sector-isolatedly to the charged L-H-E determinant channel and prove 3 mu(r) = sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(r) on that channel. Equivalently, force the determinant normalization defect N_det(P) = s_det(P) - sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(P) to vanish; on one physical charged fiber this is equivalent to O_M(r,r') = 0 together with one basepoint normalization S_M(r_0) = 3 mu(r_0).
why_smaller_than_full_landing: It asks only for one determinant character and its trace-lift attachment / normalization.
It does not ask for the full charged Yukawa matrix Y_e(P).
It is still sufficient to force s_det(P) and A_ch(P).

current_corpus_no_go.statement: The current corpus fixes the source-side determinant character S_M and the post-promotion identity-mode equalizer separately, but it does not fix their relative additive origin. One affine determinant normalization constant remains unresolved.
current_corpus_no_go.witness: mu -> mu + kappa shifts s_det and A_ch but leaves the populated q_e readback and S_M unchanged.

broader_open_landing.formula: B_D10(P) -> Y_e(P) or equivalently B_D10(P) -> s_det(P)

notes: The live q_e payload is already populated on the realized same-label arrows.
The remaining theorem is no longer a missing q_e readback claim.
The current corpus now has a formal underdetermination result: it leaves one additive determinant normalization constant unresolved.
In equivalent source-shell language, cocycle vanishing alone is not enough; one basepoint normalization is also required to identify the source-side character with the physical determinant line.
